text: l cheating or not but the point is she felt that's inappropriate behavior in a relationship and it's not up to any of us to say that's wrong that's ridiculous unreasonable no that is her thing or that might be that man's thing and as I said earlier we just have to accept that okay you just may have to you not you may have to you have to find someone who's in alignment with that and Embraces that but when we don't know that up front is going to create a disconnect so we want to discuss what is inappropriate it doesn't have to be called cheating all right because again some people will not ever want to call uh flirting cheating right but it's still inappropriate behavior that you don't like and it's best that you not only see what his perceptions of that are but yet you discuss what your perceptions are and lay out up front what will be a problem for you and vice versa because he may have some things too that he's like yeah if you do this it's it's a wrap we're done so big topic to discuss and and I think again the sooner we can ask these questions the better because we need to stop wasting our time in situations we don't belong in and remain available for that person who is truly best for you thank you for watching this video I hope and prayer was helpful to you be sure to watch this one over here titled men hate when women say these seven things in the early stages of dating to have because we have to go into these relationships and into this dating process understanding that listen we are both human beings who want to be loved who want to be valued who who want to be respected
